response.justification: Bogdan has extensive backend and distributed systems experience, including event-driven platforms and real-time systems, but lacks direct evidence of multi-agent AI production experience, fintech integration, or scaling engineering teams to 10+ members. His recent role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure, but the depth and scale are unclear. Regulatory and compliance exposure is missing.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven and real-time systems (e.g., Dunnhumby, re:cinq)
Proven track record of scaling software projects and teams (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Demonstrated technical leadership in multiple roles with a focus on software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: No clear experience with fintech infrastructure, credit systems, or embedded finance
Limited evidence of multi-agent AI system design or production deployment at scale
Gap in regulated/compliance-heavy environments; no mention of AI-system reliability or observability in fintech contexts
